brand.name: CHEW In Training
brand.description: A structured journey into community healthcare education, clinical experience, and public health awareness.

cards.title: Study Journey
cards.context: Learning healthcare one module at a time through structured study and discipline.
cards.details: This section represents the academic foundation of a CHEW student. It includes study routines, revision methods, notes organization systems, and learning strategies used in community health training.

cards.title: Clinical Experience
cards.context: Documenting real-life clinical training experiences in healthcare environments.
cards.details: This module reflects hands-on clinical exposure in hospitals, health centers, and community outreach programs. It includes patient interaction, supervision learning, and field practice experiences.

cards.title: Health Awareness
cards.context: Making health knowledge simple, accessible, and practical for everyday life.
cards.details: Focuses on public health education including hygiene, disease prevention, nutrition, maternal care, child health, and community wellness education strategies.

cards.title: Community Care
cards.context: Promoting healthier communities through awareness and outreach programs.
cards.details: Highlights community outreach work including vaccination campaigns, maternal health education, hygiene awareness, and rural health support initiatives.

cards.title: Maternal Care Focus
cards.context: Understanding pregnancy care, maternal safety, and child health fundamentals.
cards.details: Covers antenatal care, safe delivery practices, postnatal care, and maternal health education used in community health practice.

cards.title: Public Health Core
cards.context: The foundation of population health, prevention, and community wellness systems.
cards.details: Explains epidemiology basics, disease prevention systems, sanitation practices, and public health strategy implementation.

cards.title: Student Lifestyle
cards.context: Balancing academic pressure, discipline, and healthcare training life.
cards.details: Shows daily routines of a CHEW student including study schedules, fieldwork balance, rest cycles, and personal discipline habits.

cards.title: Future Health Professional
cards.context: Building the mindset, skills, and discipline of a future healthcare worker.
cards.details: Represents long-term growth into a certified community health extension worker with focus on service, care, and public health impact.
